title: Document Extraction Schema
description: Schema definition for extracting structured data from PDF documents

keys.description: List of keys to extract from the document

name.description: The key name for the extracted value

key_type.description: Type of extraction: field (single value) or list (array)

data_type.description: Data type of the extracted value

description.description: Description to help AI understand what to extract

mandatory_keys.description: List of key names that must be extracted; extraction fails if any are missing
